name: space_analysis_classify_floor_type_at_point
desc: Vertical raycast downward, find the first Floor, inspect its CompoundStructure layers + regex the names → one of {Structural | ScreededStructural | RaisedAccess | Timber | Finish | Unknown}.

parameters.name: max_distance_ft
parameters.description: Optional max downward cast (feet). Default 20 ft.

keywords: space analysis classify floor type at point
